hook: You do not need a courtroom brief every time you say no.
body: Overexplaining often reveals guilt where a simple preference or limit would have been enough.

hook: Men who fear disappointing people often talk themselves out of their own boundaries while trying to sound reasonable.
body: A short no can still be respectful when the tone is steady and clear.

hook: A short no can still be respectful when the tone is steady and clear.
body: Saying that a plan does not work for you is often cleaner than producing a long defense of why it does not.

body: Practice one firm no this week without padding it with unnecessary apology language.
